requirement_topic.en: SUBTEL Radio Approval and EMC Treatment for Cordless Tools
requirement_topic.zh: 无绳工具的 SUBTEL 无线电核准与 EMC 处理
requirement_topic.zht: 無繩工具的 SUBTEL 無線電核准與 EMC 處理

summary.en: Chile does not operate a single EU-style horizontal EMC directive for all apparatus. Radio modules in cordless tools, such as Bluetooth pairing, app connectivity, or wireless chargers, fall under SUBTEL (Subsecretaria de Telecomunicaciones) type approval before sale or import. Where a tool is a controlled electrical product, its electrical safety stays under SEC; SUBTEL handles the spectrum and radio side. EMC is addressed through SUBTEL technical conditions for radio equipment rather than a stand-alone national EMC act covering every motor tool.
summary.zh: 智利没有像欧盟那样针对所有设备的单一横向 EMC 指令。无绳工具中的无线电模块，例如蓝牙配对、应用连接或无线充电，须在销售或进口前取得 SUBTEL（电信副部）型号核准。当工具属于受控电气产品时，其电气安全仍归 SEC；SUBTEL 负责频谱和无线电方面。EMC 通过 SUBTEL 对无线电设备的技术条件处理，而非覆盖所有电机工具的独立国家 EMC 法案。
summary.zht: 智利沒有像歐盟那樣針對所有設備的單一橫向 EMC 指令。無繩工具中的無線電模組，例如藍牙配對、應用連接或無線充電，須在銷售或進口前取得 SUBTEL（電信副部）型號核准。當工具屬於受控電氣產品時，其電氣安全仍歸 SEC；SUBTEL 負責頻譜和無線電方面。EMC 通過 SUBTEL 對無線電設備的技術條件處理，而非覆蓋所有電機工具的獨立國家 EMC 法案。

standards_or_laws: SUBTEL (Subsecretaria de Telecomunicaciones) type approval for radio-transmitting equipment
SUBTEL technical conditions and resolutions for radio modules (for example Bluetooth or wireless charging in cordless tools)
SEC electrical certification remains the route for tool electrical safety

summary.en: China compliance packages may include EMC reports alongside GB/T 3883 safety reports, and SRRC type approval for embedded radio modules. SRRC and China EMC evidence do not substitute for SUBTEL Chilean type approval, which has its own application, local representative, and labelling expectations.
summary.zh: 中国合规包可能在 GB/T 3883 安全报告之外包含 EMC 报告，以及嵌入式无线电模块的 SRRC 型号核准。SRRC 和中国 EMC 证据不能替代 SUBTEL 智利型号核准，后者有自己的申请、本地代表和标识要求。
summary.zht: 中國合規包可能在 GB/T 3883 安全報告之外包含 EMC 報告，以及嵌入式無線電模組的 SRRC 型號核准。SRRC 和中國 EMC 證據不能替代 SUBTEL 智利型號核准，後者有自己的申請、本地代表和標識要求。

standards_or_laws: China EMC standards and test reports where applicable
SRRC type approval for embedded radio modules where applicable

gap.en: Exporters often assume a single EMC certificate clears Chile. In practice the split is by authority: SEC for electrical safety, SUBTEL for any radio module. A cordless tool with wireless features needs SUBTEL type approval; a corded tool with no radio module has no direct equivalent to the EU horizontal EMC directive and should be cleared mainly through SEC plus contractual or buyer EMC expectations.
gap.zh: 出口商常以为单一 EMC 证书即可放行智利。实际按主管机关划分：SEC 负责电气安全，SUBTEL 负责任何无线电模块。带无线功能的无绳工具需要 SUBTEL 型号核准；不带无线电模块的有线工具没有与欧盟横向 EMC 指令直接对应的要求，主要通过 SEC 加上合同或买方 EMC 期望来处理。
gap.zht: 出口商常以為單一 EMC 證書即可放行智利。實際按主管機關劃分：SEC 負責電氣安全，SUBTEL 負責任何無線電模組。帶無線功能的無繩工具需要 SUBTEL 型號核准；不帶無線電模組的有線工具沒有與歐盟橫向 EMC 指令直接對應的要求，主要通過 SEC 加上合同或買方 EMC 期望來處理。

target.en: Mandatory: SUBTEL type approval for radio-transmitting modules before sale or import. Chile has no single horizontal EMC act for all non-radio motor tools equivalent to the EU EMC Directive; EMC for non-radio tools is largely a contractual or buyer-driven expectation rather than a stand-alone national mandate.
target.zh: 强制：无线电发射模块在销售或进口前须取得 SUBTEL 型号核准。智利没有针对所有非无线电电机工具、等同于欧盟 EMC 指令的单一横向 EMC 法案；非无线电工具的 EMC 主要是合同或买方驱动的期望，而非独立的国家强制要求。
target.zht: 強制：無線電發射模組在銷售或進口前須取得 SUBTEL 型號核准。智利沒有針對所有非無線電電機工具、等同於歐盟 EMC 指令的單一橫向 EMC 法案；非無線電工具的 EMC 主要是合同或買方驅動的期望，而非獨立的國家強制要求。

cn.en: China domestic files may include EMC evidence and SRRC, but Chilean acceptance depends on SUBTEL type approval for radio and SEC for safety.
cn.zh: 中国境内文件可包含 EMC 证据和 SRRC，但智利接受性取决于无线电的 SUBTEL 型号核准和安全的 SEC 认证。
cn.zht: 中國境內文件可包含 EMC 證據和 SRRC，但智利接受性取決於無線電的 SUBTEL 型號核准和安全的 SEC 認證。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For cordless tools with radio modules, not Chile-ready until SUBTEL type approval is obtained and SEC electrical certification is in place. For corded tools with no radio module, there is no direct Chilean equivalent to the EU horizontal EMC directive, and clearance runs mainly through SEC.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于带无线电模块的无绳工具，在取得 SUBTEL 型号核准且具备 SEC 电气认证前，不能视为智利就绪。对于不带无线电模块的有线工具，智利没有与欧盟横向 EMC 指令直接对应的要求，放行主要通过 SEC。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於帶無線電模組的無繩工具，在取得 SUBTEL 型號核准且具備 SEC 電氣認證前，不能視為智利就緒。對於不帶無線電模組的有線工具，智利沒有與歐盟橫向 EMC 指令直接對應的要求，放行主要通過 SEC。
